---
name: Hardware Compatibility
about: Report compatibility with a specific Wacom model
title: '[HARDWARE] '
labels: hardware
assignees: ''
---

## Wacom Model
**Model Name**: [e.g. Wacom Intuos S (CTL-4100)]
**Model Number**: [e.g. CTL-4100WL]

## Status
- [ ] ✅ Works perfectly
- [ ] ⚠️ Works with issues (describe below)
- [ ] ❌ Does not work

## Linux Distribution
- Distribution: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Kernel Version: [run `uname -r`]

## What Works
- [ ] Stylus detection
- [ ] Button mapping
- [ ] Orientation/rotation
- [ ] Pressure sensitivity
- [ ] Multi-monitor mapping
- [ ] Mode toggle (absolute/relative)

## Issues Encountered
If you checked "Works with issues", describe the problems here.

## Configuration Used
```
Paste your ~/.wacom_settings.env content here (remove sensitive info)
```

## Additional Notes
Any other details about your hardware setup or configuration tips.
